given: an existing stock record for a (sku, location) pair
when: the operator files the same (sku, location) again
then: the operator stays on a normal stock screen with no error page shown for the collision

independence.rationale: AC3 asserts the data outcome (single updated record); this AC adds the distinct user-visible outcome that the collision is handled calmly without an error page.

architectural_notes: E2E: the user-visible face of the same collision resolution as AC3, but asserting graceful outcome rather than data shape. The service treats a refile as a normal upsert returning a 2xx, so the SPA stays on a normal stock screen with no error page; the boundary maps the resolved write to a success response, never surfacing the unique-constraint collision (PI1) as a 4xx/5xx. Owner: boundary (app/routes/) response mapping + client navigation. Verified as a real-branch integration test: the second file of the same (sku, location) returns a save confirmation, not an error page.
